title: Regression (?) Podman 2.1.0 - ADD openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz -> "unrecognized Typeflag g"
body:
```
> cat Dockerfile 
FROM debian:buster-slim

ARG OPENSSL_VER=1.1.1g
ADD downloads/openssl-$OPENSSL_VER.tar.gz /usr/src/
```

```
 > podman build --rm -t test .
STEP 1: FROM debian:buster-slim
STEP 2: ARG OPENSSL_VER=1.1.1g
--> Using cache 208ffbcad798377eccaf149b06e20e0dd8103eaec5cc56465c9771db49c64586
--> 208ffbcad79
STEP 3: ADD downloads/openssl-$OPENSSL_VER.tar.gz /usr/src/
Error: error building at STEP "ADD downloads/openssl-$OPENSSL_VER.tar.gz /usr/src/": error adding sources [/tmp/test/downloads/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz]: 2 errors occurred:
	* error reading "/tmp/test/downloads/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz": error during bulk transfer for copier.request{Request:"GET", Root:"/", preservedRoot:"/tmp/test", rootPrefix:"/tmp/test", Directory:"/", preservedDirectory:"/tmp/test", Globs:[]string{"/downloads/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz"}, preservedGlobs:[]string{"/tmp/test/downloads/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz"}, StatOptions:copier.StatOptions{CheckForArchives:true, Excludes:[]string(nil)}, GetOptions:copier.GetOptions{UIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), GIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), Excludes:[]string{""}, ExpandArchives:true, StripSetuidBit:true, StripSetgidBit:true, StripStickyBit:false, StripXattrs:false, KeepDirectoryNames:false}, PutOptions:copier.PutOptions{UIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), GIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), ChownDirs:(*idtools.IDPair)(nil), ChmodDirs:(*os.FileMode)(nil), ChownFiles:(*idtools.IDPair)(nil), ChmodFiles:(*os.FileMode)(nil), StripXattrs:false, IgnoreXattrErrors:false}, MkdirOptions:copier.MkdirOptions{UIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), GIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), ChownNew:(*idtools.IDPair)(nil), ChmodNew:(*os.FileMode)(nil)}}: copier: get: "/downloads/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz": error extracting content from archive /downloads/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz: openssl-1.1.1g/CHANGES: write bulk-writer: broken pipe
	* error storing "/tmp/test/downloads/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz": error during bulk transfer for copier.request{Request:"PUT", Root:"/", preservedRoot:"/mnt/vm/libpod/avatar/graph/overlay/05f34afbe1b483a6c2ab249130764a6a84ecd8dedd4cc3e233c698d5f90b8eae/merged", rootPrefix:"/mnt/vm/libpod/avatar/graph/overlay/05f34afbe1b483a6c2ab249130764a6a84ecd8dedd4cc3e233c698d5f90b8eae/merged", Directory:"/usr/src", preservedDirectory:"/mnt/vm/libpod/avatar/graph/overlay/05f34afbe1b483a6c2ab249130764a6a84ecd8dedd4cc3e233c698d5f90b8eae/merged/usr/src", Globs:[]string{}, preservedGlobs:[]string{}, StatOptions:copier.StatOptions{CheckForArchives:false, Excludes:[]string(nil)}, GetOptions:copier.GetOptions{UIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), GIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), Excludes:[]string(nil), ExpandArchives:false, StripSetuidBit:false, StripSetgidBit:false, StripStickyBit:false, StripXattrs:false, KeepDirectoryNames:false}, PutOptions:copier.PutOptions{UIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap{}, GIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap{}, ChownDirs:(*idtools.IDPair)(0xc0000d5bf0), ChmodDirs:(*os.FileMode)(nil), ChownFiles:(*idtools.IDPair)(0xc0000d5c00), ChmodFiles:(*os.FileMode)(nil), StripXattrs:false, IgnoreXattrErrors:false}, MkdirOptions:copier.MkdirOptions{UIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), GIDMap:[]idtools.IDMap(nil), ChownNew:(*idtools.IDPair)(nil), ChmodNew:(*os.FileMode)(nil)}}: unrecognized Typeflag g
```

Could you try this as root, to see if this is a user namespace issue.

Where can we get the file
ARG OPENSSL_VER=1.1.1g
ADD downloads/openssl-$OPENSSL_VER.tar.gz /usr/src/

Same story with root.
File: https://www.openssl.org/source/openssl-1.1.1g.tar.gz
It looks like some Tar issue. At least I saw the check "unrecognized Typeflag" in buildah.
The problem seems to be internal to buildah
Looks like the fix is merged already (https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/2718) but didn't get to the today's deps bump

yes, so the next release will fix this, so I will close this issue
/close

@zhangguanzhang: Closing this issue.
